commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a set of business files to the project(s)

options.name: --scaffold
options.description:
Type of scaffold to generate. Acceptable values
are: application, domain, controller and full.

options.name: --type
options.description:
Type of structure to generate. Acceptable values
are: base, list, search and entity.

options.name: --idType
options.description:
Type of the ID. It can be any C# valid type for
IDs.

options.name: --entity
options.description:
Entity name (using the exact format, ie:
companycategory != CompanyCategory).

options.name: --entityPlural
options.description:
Plural entity name (using the exact format, ie:
companycategories != CompanyCategories).

options.name: --inputModel
options.description:
Input type (using the exact format, ie:
categoryinput/model != CategoryInput/Model).

options.name: --responseModel
options.description:
Response type (using the exact format, ie:
categoryresponse/model !=
CategoryResponse/Model).

options.name: --applicationProject
options.description:
Name of the project representing the application
layer.

options.name: --contractsProject
options.description: Name of the project representing the contracts

options.name: --domainProject
options.description: Name of the project representing the domain

options.name: --userInterfaceProject
options.description:
Name of the project representing the
UserInterface layer.

options.name: --modelsProject
options.description: Name of the project representing the models

options.name: --persistenceProject
options.description: Name of the project representing the persistence

options.name: --projectPrefix
options.description: Prefix of the projects to be created.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: structure
commands.description: Creates the solution and/or projects structure

options.name: --type
options.description:
Type of structure to generate. Acceptable values are:
full-with-sln, full, app, domain, contracts, ui,
persistence, models, migrations.

options.name: --newSolutionName
options.description: Name of the solution to be created.

options.name: --projectPrefix
options.description: Prefix of the project(s) to be created.

options.name: --databaseType
options.description:
Type of database. Acceptable values are: sqlserver,
mysql, sqlite, postgres.

options.name: --mappingTool
options.description:
Mapping tool. Acceptable values are: mapster,
automapper.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
